title: Waisly – a budgeting app that never asks for your bank login
abstract: Tired of manual budgeting? Enter Waisly – a budgeting app that doesn't require your bank login. Think of it as a personal financial assistant discreetly managing your finances behind the scenes. Say goodbye to privacy concerns and hello to easy, secure budget tracking. Give it a try!
abstract_zh: 你还在为记账烦恼吗？Waisly来了！这是一款不需要你输入银行登录信息的预算应用，就像有了个私人财务顾问，默默地帮你整理收支。从此，记账不用怕被监控，隐私更安全哦！快来试试吧！
